description_long: This rustic wooden cabin features a steep gabled roof with weathered shingles and a prominent stone chimney. The exterior walls are constructed from dark timber planks, accented by a lower section of stonework and several multi-paned, glowing windows. A wooden staircase leads up to a covered porch, which is supported by sturdy posts and includes a small overhang above the main entrance. The cabin is adorned with a hanging sign and a barrel near the front door, adding to its old-world charm. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped and others spaced apart, and the roof includes a small dormer with a circular window. The overall design suggests a cozy, hand-built dwelling suitable for a village or rural neighborhood.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gabled roof, stone accents, glowing windows, and a covered porch accessed by a wooden staircase.
description_view_0: The main entrance is visible with a covered porch, wooden stairs, a hanging sign, and a small dormer window above the door.
description_view_1: Side view showing the steep roof, stone chimney, and two rectangular windows set in the stone base.
description_view_2: Opposite side with three windows, a barrel, and visible timber planks; the porch and stairs are less prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the back door, stone base, and the full length of the wooden staircase and porch structure.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with weathered wooden shingles, stone chimney, and a small dormer window
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small rectangular and one circular window, asymmetrically distributed with some grouped and others spaced apart, including a cluster of three on one side and a dormer window above the entrance
attribute_door_placement: One main door centered on the front facade beneath the porch, and one rear door aligned with the back staircase
